case_title: ROMAN LEONID RUDOVSKIY VS. DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,514.73 FILED BY RUDOVSKIY, ROMAN LEONID AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GREG COCHRAN--GENERAL MANAGER AND STEVE SHATZ. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER---YURY SMILOVITSKY.NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 15.00 - SERVED MAY-06-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUDOVSKIY, ROMAN LEONID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
